title: Coffee Shop Basics
description: Order a coffee and a pastry, then chat about the weather.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi there! What can I get you today?

templates.text: I'd like a medium latte, please.
templates.hint_zh: 我想要一杯中杯拿鐵,謝謝。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Anything to eat with that?

templates.text: A blueberry muffin would be great.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great choice. That'll be six fifty. For here or to go?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Lovely day, isn't it? The rain finally stopped this morning.

templates.text: Yeah, it's been raining all week. I'm glad it's over.
templates.hint_zh: 對啊,下了一整週,終於停了真好。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Take a seat by the window, I'll bring it over in a minute.

templates.text: Sounds good, thank you so much!
